name: HTS_COVERAGE_DETAILS
description: Stores the coverage detail records of the workload plan and schedule shift, fully expanded to every 15 minute time slot.

columns.Name: COVERAGE_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Table primary key. Ideally values are automatically incremented using a database sequence

columns.Name: COVERAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier to uniquely refer to a coverage record

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Standard enterprise identifier column for multi tenancy support

columns.Name: SCHED_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the department, that the relevant schedule coverage calculation applies to

columns.Name: SCHED_SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the schedule coverage skill

columns.Name: COVERAGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date that the coverage calculation applies to

columns.Name: COVERAGE_START_DATE_TIME
columns.Comments: Date and time when the coverage starts, such as 1-JUL-2023 00:15

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_BASELINE_DURATION
columns.Comments: Baseline duraiton for the workload plan, measured in minutes

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_ACTUAL_DURATION
columns.Comments: Actual duration from the workload plan, measured in minutes

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_SHIFTS_DURATION
columns.Comments: Assigned shift duration determined from the schedule shift, measured in minutes

columns.Name: OPEN_SHIFTS_DURATION
columns.Comments: Open shift duration determined from scheduled shifts, measured in minutes

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
